pali: 4 . Sabbaññutañāṇavaggo
chinese: 4.一切知的狀態智品 [目錄]

pali: 1 . Iddhikammavipākapañho
1.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena, bhāsitampetaṃ bhagavatā‘ etadaggaṃ, bhikkhave, mama sāvakānaṃ bhikkhūnaṃ iddhimantānaṃ yadidaṃ mahāmoggallāno’ ti.
chinese: 我的弟子比丘有神通者們的這個首位，即：大目揵連。

pali: Puna ca kira so laguḷehi paripothito bhinnasīso sañcuṇṇitaṭṭhimaṃsadhamanichinnaparigatto parinibbuto[ dhamanimajjaparikatto( sī. pī.), dhammanimiñjaparigatto( syā.)].
chinese: [AN.1.190]』又，另一方面，他確實被棍棒毆打，頭被打破，骨被粉碎，遍體肌肉血管被切斷而被般涅槃[AA.26.9]。

pali: Yadi, bhante nāgasena, thero mahāmoggallāno iddhiyā koṭiṃ gato, tena hi laguḷehi pothito parinibbutoti yaṃ vacanaṃ, taṃ micchā.
chinese: 如果大目揵連上座已到達神通的頂點，那樣的話，『被棍棒毆打而被般涅槃』，該言語是錯誤的。

pali: Yadi laguḷehi paripothito parinibbuto, tena hi iddhiyā koṭiṃ gatoti tampi vacanaṃ micchā.
chinese: 如果被棍棒毆打而被般涅槃，那樣的話，『已到達神通的頂點』，那個言語也是錯誤的。

pali: Kiṃ na samattho iddhiyā attano upaghātaṃ apanayituṃ, sadevakassapi lokassa paṭisaraṇaṃ bhavituṃ arahoti?
chinese: 「大王！

pali: Ayampi ubhato koṭiko pañho tavānuppatto, so tayā nibbāhitabbo’’ ti.
chinese: 屬於我弟子比丘有神通者們的這個首位，即：大目揵連。

pali: ‘ ‘ Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā‘ etadaggaṃ, bhikkhave, mama sāvakānaṃ bhikkhūnaṃ iddhimantānaṃ yadidaṃ mahāmoggallāno’ ti.
chinese: 「那先大德！

pali: Āyasmā ca mahāmoggallāno laguḷahato parinibbuto, tañca pana kammādhiggahitenā’’ ti.
chinese: 有神通的神通境域、業的果報(業報)二者都是不可思議的，不可思議的能被不可思議的除去，不是嗎？

pali: ‘ ‘ Nanu, bhante nāgasena, iddhimato iddhivisayopi kammavipākopi dve acintiyā, acintiyena acintiyaṃ apanayitabbaṃ.
chinese: 如有人確實想要果實，他們以蘋果打蘋果，以芒果打芒果。

pali: Yathā nāma, bhante, keci phalakāmā kapitthena kapitthaṃ pothenti, ambena ambaṃ pothenti, evameva kho, bhante nāgasena, acintiyena acintiyaṃ pothayitvā apanetabban’’ ti?
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘‘ Acintiyānampi, mahārāja, ekaṃ adhimattaṃ balavataraṃ, yathā, mahārāja, mahiyā rājāno honti samajaccā, samajaccānampi tesaṃ eko sabbe abhibhavitvā āṇaṃ pavatteti.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: Evameva kho, mahārāja, tesaṃ acintiyānaṃ kammavipākaṃ yeva adhimattaṃ balavataraṃ, kammavipākaṃ yeva sabbe abhibhaviya āṇaṃ pavatteti, kammādhiggahitassa avasesā kiriyā okāsaṃ na labhanti.
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Idha pana, mahārāja, koci puriso kismiñcideva pakaraṇe aparajjhati, na tassa mātā vā pitā vā bhaginī vā bhātaro vā sakhī vā sahāyakā vā[ bhaginibhātaro vā sakhisahāyakā vā( sī. pī. ka.)] tāyanti, atha kho rājā yeva tattha abhibhaviya āṇaṃ pavatteti.
chinese: 屬於那些不可思議的中，業的果報就是更極度有力的，業的果報就擊敗所有的後使威力轉起，被業擊敗的其餘諸行動沒得到機會。

pali: Kiṃ tattha kāraṇaṃ?
Aparādhikatā.
Evameva kho, mahārāja, tesaṃ acintiyānaṃ kammavipākaṃ yeva adhimattaṃ balavataraṃ, kammavipākaṃ yeva sabbe abhibhaviya āṇaṃ pavatteti, kammādhiggahitassa avasesā kiriyā okāsaṃ na labhanti.
chinese: 在那裡，什麼是理由呢？

pali: ‘ ‘ Yathā vā pana, mahārāja, mahiyā davaḍāhe samuṭṭhite ghaṭasahassampi udakaṃ na sakkoti nibbāpetuṃ, atha kho aggi yeva tattha abhibhaviya āṇaṃ pavatteti.
chinese: 屬於那些不可思議的中，業的果報就是更極度有力的，業的果報就擊敗所有的後使威力轉起，被業擊敗的其餘諸行動沒得到機會。

pali: Kiṃ tattha kāraṇaṃ?
Balavatā tejassa.

Evameva kho, mahārāja, tesaṃ acintiyānaṃ kammavipākaṃ yeva adhimattaṃ balavataraṃ, kammavipākaṃ yeva sabbe abhibhaviya āṇaṃ pavatteti, kammādhiggahitassa avasesā kiriyā okāsaṃ na labhanti, tasmā, mahārāja, āyasmato mahāmoggallānassa kammādhiggahitassa laguḷehi pothiyamānassa iddhiyā samannāhāro nāhosī’’ ti.
chinese: 這也被世尊說：『比丘們！

pali: ‘‘ Sādhu, bhante nāgasena, evametaṃ tathā sampaṭicchāmī’’ ti.
chinese: 如來教說的法律，當被公開時輝耀，非當被隱密時。

pali: Iddhikammavipākapañho paṭhamo.
chinese: 』又，另一方面，波羅提木叉的誦說與全部律藏被封閉、被隱密。

pali: 2 . Dhammavinayapaṭicchannāpaṭicchannapañho
2.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena, bhāsitampetaṃ bhagavatā‘ tathāgatappavedito, bhikkhave, dhammavinayo vivaṭo virocati no paṭicchanno’ ti.
chinese: 如果在勝者之教中得到適當的，或到達的之機會，律的安立以被公開而輝耀，以什麼理由呢？

pali: Puna ca pātimokkhuddeso kevalañca vinayapiṭakaṃ pihitaṃ paṭicchannaṃ.
chinese: 在那裡有全部的學、抑制、約制、戒與種種行的安立、義理味、法味、解脫味。

pali: Yadi, bhante nāgasena, jinasāsane yuttaṃ vā pattaṃ vā samayaṃ labhetha, vinayapaṇṇatti vivaṭā sobheyya.
chinese: 如來教說的法律，當被公開時輝耀，非當被隱密時。

pali: Kena kāraṇena?
Kevalaṃ tattha sikkhā saṃyamo niyamo sīlaguṇaācārapaṇṇatti attharaso dhammaraso vimuttiraso.
chinese: 』那樣的話，『波羅提木叉的誦說與全部律藏被封閉、被隱密。

pali: Yadi, bhante nāgasena, bhagavatā bhaṇitaṃ‘ tathāgatappavedito, bhikkhave, dhammavinayo vivaṭo virocati no paṭicchanno’ ti, tena hi‘ pātimokkhuddeso kevalañca vinayapiṭakaṃ pihitaṃ paṭicchannan’ ti yaṃ vacanaṃ, taṃ micchā.
chinese: 』那個言語也是錯誤的。

pali: Yadi pātimokkhuddeso kevalañca vinayapiṭakaṃ pihitaṃ paṭicchannaṃ, tena hi‘ tathāgatappavedito, bhikkhave, dhammavinayo vivaṭo virocati no paṭicchanno’ ti tampi vacanaṃ micchā.
chinese: 如來教說的法律，當被公開時輝耀，非當被隱密時。

pali: Ayampi ubhato koṭiko pañho tavānuppatto, so tayā nibbāhitabbo’’ ti.
chinese: 』又，另一方面，波羅提木叉的誦說與全部律藏被封閉、被隱密，但那不是對全部人，他們作結界後被封閉。

pali: ‘ ‘ Bhāsitampetaṃ , mahārāja, bhagavatā‘ tathāgatappavedito, bhikkhave, dhammavinayo vivaṭo virocati no paṭicchanno’ ti.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Puna ca pātimokkhuddeso kevalañca vinayapiṭakaṃ pihitaṃ paṭicchannaṃ, tañca pana na sabbesaṃ, sīmaṃ katvā pihitaṃ.
chinese: 以三種，波羅提木叉的誦說作結界後被世尊封閉：因以前如來們的傳承而波羅提木叉的誦說作結界後被封閉、對法的尊重被封閉、對比丘比丘尼的尊重被封閉。

pali: ‘ ‘ Tividhena, mahārāja, bhagavatā pātimokkhuddeso sīmaṃ katvā pihito, pubbakānaṃ tathāgatānaṃ vaṃsavasena pātimokkhuddeso sīmaṃ katvā pihito, dhammassa garukattā pihito, bhikkhubhūmiyā garukattā pihito.
chinese: 大德！

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ pubbakānaṃ tathāgatānaṃ vaṃsavasena pātimokkhuddeso sīmaṃ katvā pihito, eso vaṃso, mahārāja, sabbesaṃ pubbakānaṃ tathāgatānaṃ yadidaṃ bhikkhumajjhe pātimokkhuddeso avasesānaṃ pihito.
chinese: 這是以前全部如來的傳承，即：在比丘中波羅提木叉的誦說對其餘人它被封閉。

pali: Yathā, mahārāja, khattiyānaṃ khattiyamāyā khattiyesu yeva carati, evametaṃ khattiyānaṃ lokassa paveṇī avasesānaṃ pihitā.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Evameva kho, mahārāja, eso vaṃso sabbesaṃ pubbakānaṃ tathāgatānaṃ yadidaṃ bhikkhumajjhe pātimokkhuddeso avasesānaṃ pihito.
chinese: 又或如大地的諸團體轉起，即：『角力士、魔術師、住山上者(?)、達磨劇表演者、婆羅門劇表演者、舞蹈者、表演者、雜技表演者、毘舍闍崇拜者、摩尼賢崇拜者、滿賢崇拜者、日月崇拜者、吉祥神崇拜者、葛哩神崇拜者、濕婆神崇拜者、財神崇拜者、雲天崇拜者、刀網者、賢者之子。

pali: ‘ ‘ Yathā vā pana, mahārāja, mahiyā gaṇā vattanti, seyyathidaṃ, mallā atoṇā pabbatā dhammagiriyā brahmagiriyā naṭakā naccakā laṅghakā pisācā maṇibhaddā puṇṇabaddhā candimasūriyā siridevatā kālidevatā, sivā vasudevā ghanikā asipāsā bhaddiputtāti, tesaṃ tesaṃ rahassaṃ tesu tesu gaṇesu yeva carati, avasesānaṃ pihitaṃ.
chinese: 這是以前全部如來的傳承，即：在比丘中波羅提木叉的誦說對其餘人它被封閉。

pali: Evameva kho, mahārāja, eso vaṃso sabbesaṃ pubbakānaṃ tathāgatānaṃ yadidaṃ bhikkhumajjhe pātimokkhuddeso avasesānaṃ pihito.
chinese: 怎樣是對法的尊重被封閉呢？

pali: Evaṃ pubbakānaṃ tathāgatānaṃ vaṃsavasena pātimokkhuddeso sīmaṃ katvā pihito.
chinese: 法是重要的、重的，在那裡，正性執行者達成完全智。

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ dhammassa garukattā pātimokkhuddeso sīmaṃ katvā pihito?

Dhammo, mahārāja, garuko bhāriyo, tattha sammattakārī aññaṃ ārādheti, taṃ tattha paramparāsammattakāritāya pāpuṇāti, na taṃ tattha paramparāsammattakāritāya pāpuṇāti, mā cāyaṃ sāradhammo varadhammo asammattakārīnaṃ hatthagato oññāto avaññāto hīḷito khīḷito garahito bhavatu, mā cāyaṃ sāradhammo varadhammo dujjanagato oññāto avaññāto hīḷito khīḷito garahito bhavatūti.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Evaṃ dhammassa garukattā pātimokkhuddeso sīmaṃ katvā pihito.
chinese: 如堅實、殊勝、最頂尖、有良好出身、高貴的赤紅栴檀成為落入賤民(聚集)的城市而被輕蔑、被輕視、被蔑視、被藐視、被呵責。

pali: ‘ ‘ Yathā, mahārāja, sāravarapavaraabhijātajātimantarattalohitacandanaṃ nāma savarapuramanugataṃ oññātaṃ avaññātaṃ hīḷitaṃ khīḷitaṃ garahitaṃ bhavati, evameva kho, mahārāja, mā cāyaṃ sāradhammo varadhammo paramparāasammattakārīnaṃ hatthagato oññāto avaññāto hīḷito khīḷito garahito bhavatu, mā cāyaṃ sāradhammo varadhammo dujjanagato oññāto avaññāto hīḷito khīḷito garahito bhavatūti.
chinese: 』這樣是對法的尊重被封閉。

pali: Evaṃ dhammassa garukattā pātimokkhuddeso sīmaṃ katvā pihito .
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Kathaṃ bhikkhubhūmiyā garukattā pātimokkhuddeso sīmaṃ katvā pihito, bhikkhubhāvo kho, mahārāja, loke atuliyo appamāṇo anagghiyo, na sakkā kenaci agghāpetuṃ tuletuṃ parimetuṃ, māyaṃ evarūpe bhikkhubhāve ṭhito lokena samasamo bhavatūti bhikkhūnaṃ yeva antare pātimokkhuddeso carati.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Yathā, mahārāja, loke varapavarabhaṇḍaṃ vatthaṃ vā attharaṇaṃ vā gajaturaṅgarathasuvaṇṇarajatamaṇimuttāitthiratanādīni vā vijitakammasūrā vā[ nijjitakammasūrā vā( sī. pī.)] sabbe te rājānamupagacchanti, evameva kho, mahārāja, yāvatā loke[ loke sikkhā( sī. pī.)] sugatāgamapariyattiācārasaṃyamasīlasaṃvaraguṇā, sabbe te bhikkhusaṅghamupagatā bhavanti.
chinese: 這樣是對比丘比丘尼的尊重而波羅提木叉的誦說作結界後被封閉。

pali: Evaṃ bhikkhubhūmiyā garukattā pātimokkhuddeso sīmaṃ katvā pihito’’ ti.
‘‘ Sādhu, bhante nāgasena, evametaṃ tathā sampiṭicchāmī’’ ti.
chinese: 3.妄語輕重性的問題 [目錄]

pali: Dhammavinayapaṭicchannāpaṭicchannapañho dutiyo.
chinese: 3.「那先大德！

pali: 3 . Musāvādagarulahubhāvapañho
chinese: 這也被世尊說：『故意妄語為波羅夷(驅擯罪)。

pali: 3.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena, bhāsitampetaṃ bhagavatā‘ sampajānamusāvāde pārājiko hotī’ ti.
chinese: [波羅夷4]』又，另一方面，『故意妄語為輕罪，在一位[比丘]的面前來到事件的懺悔。

pali: Puna ca bhaṇitaṃ‘ sampajānamusāvāde lahukaṃ āpattiṃ āpajjati ekassa santike desanāvatthukan’ ti.
chinese: 那麼，在這裡，差別是什麼？

pali: Bhante nāgasena, ko panettha viseso, kiṃ kāraṇaṃ, yañcekena musāvādena ucchijjati, yañcekena musāvādena satekiccho hoti?
chinese: 如果『故意妄語為波羅夷。

pali: Yadi, bhante nāgasena, bhagavatā bhaṇitaṃ‘ sampajānamusāvāde pārājiko hotī’ ti, tena hi‘ sampajānamusāvāde lahukaṃ āpattiṃ āpajjati ekassa santike desanāvatthukan’ ti yaṃ vacanaṃ, taṃ micchā.
chinese: 如果『故意妄語為輕罪，在一位的面前來到事件的懺悔。

pali: Yadi tathāgatena bhaṇitaṃ‘ sampajānamusāvāde lahukaṃ āpattiṃ āpajjati ekassa santike desanāvatthukan’ ti, tena hi‘ sampajānamusāvāde pārājiko hotī’ ti tampi vacanaṃ micchā.
chinese: 「大王！

pali: Ayampi ubhato koṭiko pañho tavānuppatto, so tayā nibbāhitabbo’’ ti.
chinese: 這也被世尊說：『故意妄語為波羅夷。

pali: ‘ ‘ Bhāsitampetaṃ , mahārāja, bhagavatā‘ sampajānamusāvāde pārājiko hotī’ ti.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Bhaṇitañca ‘ sampajānamusāvāde lahukaṃ āpattiṃ āpajjati ekassa santike desanāvatthukan’ ti, tañca pana vatthuvasena garukalahukaṃ hoti.
chinese: 如果他說：『我不原諒。

pali: Taṃ kiṃ maññasi, mahārāja, idha koci puriso parassa pāṇinā pahāraṃ dadeyya, tassa tumhe kiṃ daṇḍaṃ dhārethā’’ ti?
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: ‘‘ Yadi so, bhante, āha‘ nakkhamāmī’ ti, tassa mayaṃ akkhamamāne kahāpaṇaṃ harāpemā’’ ti‘‘ idha pana, mahārāja, so yeva puriso tava pāṇinā pahāraṃ dadeyya, tassa pana ko daṇḍo’’ ti?
chinese: 我們會切斷他的手，我們也會切斷腳，我們會切斷到頂上的頭為止，我們也會掠奪他家一切，我們也會根除[父母]兩翼直到第七個家族為止。

pali: ‘‘ Hatthampissa, bhante, chedāpeyyāma, pādampi chedāpeyyāma, yāva sīsaṃ kaḷīracchejjaṃ chedāpeyyāma, sabbampi taṃ gehaṃ vilumpāpeyyāma, ubhatopakkhe[ ubhatopasse( sī. pī. ka.)] yāva sattamaṃ kulaṃ samugghātāpeyyāmā’’ ti.
chinese: 什麼理由對一個在手的毆打上是輕的貨幣處罰，對一個在手的毆打上是切斷手、切斷腳、切斷直到頂上為止，拿取家的一切，根除兩翼直到七代為止呢？

pali: ‘‘ Ko panettha, mahārāja, viseso, kiṃ kāraṇaṃ, yaṃ ekassa pāṇippahāre sukhumo kahāpaṇo daṇḍo, yaṃ tava pāṇippahāre hatthacchejjaṃ pādacchejjaṃ yāva kaḷīracchejjaṃ sabbagehādānaṃ ubhatopakkhe yāva sattamakulā samugghāto’’ ti?
‘‘ Manussantarena, bhante’’ ti.
chinese: 妄語輕重性的問題第三。

pali: ‘‘ Evameva kho, mahārāja, sampajānamusāvādo vatthuvasena garukalahuko hotī’’ ti.
chinese: 4.「那先大德！

pali: ‘‘ Sādhu, bhante nāgasena, evametaṃ tathā sampaṭicchāmī’’ ti.
Musāvādagarulahubhāvapañho tatiyo.
chinese: 這也被世尊在常法法門中說：『菩薩們的父母是在之前就已決定的，菩提樹是已決定的，第一弟子們是已決定的，兒子是已決定的，侍者是已決定的。

pali: 4 . Bodhisattadhammatāpañho

4.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena, bhāsitampetaṃ bhagavatā dhammatādhammapariyāye‘ pubbeva bodhisattānaṃ mātāpitaro niyatā honti, bodhi niyatā hoti, aggasāvakā niyatā honti, putto niyato hoti, upaṭṭhāko niyato hotī’ ti.
chinese: 』又，另一方面，你們說：『當住立在兜率天群時，菩薩考察八大考察：他考察時間、考察洲島、考察地點、考察家、考察生母、考察壽命、考察月份、考察出離(出家)。

pali: Puna ca tumhe bhaṇatha‘ tusite kāye ṭhito bodhisatto aṭṭha mahāvilokanāni viloketi, kālaṃ viloketi, dīpaṃ viloketi, desaṃ viloketi, kulaṃ viloketi, janettiṃ viloketi, āyuṃ viloketi, māsaṃ viloketi, nekkhammaṃ viloketī’ ti.
chinese: 在智未遍熟時沒有覺醒，在智遍熟時也不能眨眼間等待，遍熟的心意是不能被越過的，為何菩薩考察時間：『我在什麼時間出生？

pali: Bhante nāgasena, aparipakke ñāṇe bujjhanaṃ natthi, paripakke ñāṇe na sakkā nimesantarampi āgametuṃ, anatikkamanīyaṃ paripakkamānasaṃ.
chinese: 』那先大德！

pali: Kasmā bodhisatto kālaṃ vilokehi‘ kamhi kāle uppajjāmī’ ti.
chinese: 如果菩薩的父母是在之前就已決定的，那樣的話，『他考察家。

pali: Aparipakke ñāṇe bujjhanaṃ natthi, paripakke ñāṇe na sakkā nimesantarampi āgametuṃ, kasmā bodhisatto kulaṃ viloketi‘ kumhi kule uppajjāmī’ ti.
chinese: 』那個言語也是錯誤的。

pali: Yadi, bhante nāgasena, pubbeva bodhisattassa mātāpitaro niyatā, tena hi‘ kulaṃ viloketī’ ti yaṃ vacanaṃ, taṃ micchā.
chinese: 菩薩的父母是在之前就已決定的，且菩薩考察家，但他如何考察家呢？

pali: Yadi kulaṃ viloketi, tena hi‘ pubbeva bodhisattassa mātāpitaro niyatā’ ti tampi vacanaṃ micchā.
chinese: 『凡我的父母者，他們是剎帝利，還是婆羅門？

pali: Ayampi ubhato koṭiko pañho tavānuppatto, so tayā nibbāhitabbo’’ ti.
chinese: 對八種，未來到的是在之前就能被檢視的，對哪八種？

pali: ‘ ‘ Niyatā, mahārāja, pubbeva bodhisattassa mātāpitaro, kulañca bodhisatto viloketi.
chinese: 對商人，出售物是在之前就能被檢視的。

pali: Kinti pana kulaṃ viloketi‘ ye me mātāpitaro, te khattiyā udāhu brāhmaṇā’ ti.
chinese: 對大象，未來到的道路是在之前就能被以象鼻檢視的。

pali: Evaṃ kulaṃ viloketi.
chinese: 對車夫，未來到的渡場是在之前就能被檢視的。

pali: ‘ ‘ Aṭṭhannaṃ, mahārāja, pubbeva anāgataṃ oloketabbaṃ hoti.
chinese: 對船長，未來到的岸在之前就檢視後船是能被發出的。

pali: Katamesaṃ aṭṭhannaṃ?

Vāṇijassa, mahārāja, pubbeva vikkayabhaṇḍaṃ oloketabbaṃ hoti, hatthināgassa pubbeva soṇḍāya anāgato maggo oloketabbo hoti, sākaṭikassa pubbeva anāgataṃ titthaṃ oloketabbaṃ hoti, niyāmakassa pubbeva anāgataṃ tīraṃ oloketvā nāvā pesetabbā hoti, bhisakkassa pubbeva āyuṃ oloketvā āturo upasaṅkamitabbo hoti, uttarasetussa pubbeva thirāthirabhāvaṃ jānitvā abhiruhitabbaṃ hoti, bhikkhussa pubbeva anāgataṃ kālaṃ paccavekkhitvā bhojanaṃ bhuñjitabbaṃ hoti, bodhisattānaṃ pubbeva kulaṃ oloketabbaṃ hoti ‘ khattiyakulaṃ vā brāhmaṇakulaṃ vā’ ti.
chinese: 5.「那先大德！

pali: Imesaṃ kho, mahārāja, aṭṭhannaṃ pubbeva anāgataṃ oloketabbaṃ hotī’’ ti.
chinese: 不應該使自己墮落，凡如果使墮落者，應該使之被依法執行(作)。

pali: ‘‘ Sādhu, bhante nāgasena, evametaṃ tathā sampaṭicchāmī’’ ti.
Bodhisattadhammatāpañho catuttho.
5 . Attanipātanapañho
5.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena, bhāsitampetaṃ bhagavatā‘ na, bhikkhave, attānaṃ pātetabbaṃ, yo pāteyya, yathādhammo kāretabbo’ ti.
chinese: 』那先大德！

pali: Puna ca tumhe bhaṇatha‘ yattha katthaci bhagavā sāvakānaṃ dhammaṃ desayamāno anekapariyāyena jātiyā jarāya byādhino maraṇassa samucchedāya dhammaṃ deseti, yo hi koci jātijarābyādhimaraṇaṃ samatikkamati, taṃ paramāya pasaṃsāya pasaṃsatī’ ti.
chinese: 如果為了生老病死之斷除教導法，那樣的話，『比丘們！

pali: Yadi, bhante nāgasena, bhagavatā bhaṇitaṃ‘ na, bhikkhave, attānaṃ pātetabbaṃ, yo pāteyya, yathādhammo kāretabbo’ ti, tena hi‘ jātiyā jarāya byādhino maraṇassa samucchedāya dhammaṃ desetī’ ti yaṃ vacanaṃ, taṃ micchā.
chinese: 這也被世尊說：『比丘們！

pali: Yadi jātiyā jarāya byādhino maraṇassa samucchedāya dhammaṃ deseti, tena hi‘ na, bhikkhave, attānaṃ pātetabbaṃ, yo pāteyya, yathādhammo kāretabbo’’ ti tampi vacanaṃ micchā.
chinese: 』且世尊無論在何處，當為弟子們說法時，以各種法門為了生老病死之斷除教導法，但，在那裡，有理由，以該理由世尊反對又勸導。

pali: Ayampi ubhato koṭiko pañho tavānuppatto, so tayā nibbāhitabbo’’ ti.
‘ ‘ Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā‘ na, bhikkhave, attānaṃ pātetabbaṃ, yo pāteyya, yathādhammo kāretabbo’ ti.
chinese: 」「大王！

pali: Yattha katthaci bhagavatā sāvakānaṃ dhammaṃ desayāmānena ca anekapariyāyena jātiyā jarāya byādhino maraṇassa samucchedāya dhammo desito, tattha pana kāraṇaṃ atthi, yena bhagavā kāraṇena paṭikkhipi samādapesi cā’’ ti.
‘ ‘ Kiṃ panettha, bhante nāgasena, kāraṇaṃ, yena bhagavā kāraṇena paṭikkhipi samādapesi cā’’ ti?
chinese: 持戒者、戒具足者在眾生的污染毒之破壞上是等同解毒劑的，在眾生的污染病之減輕(平息)上是等同草藥的，在眾生的污染塵垢之除去上是等同水的，在眾生的一切成就之布施上是等同寶珠的，在眾生的四暴流之到彼岸上是等船的，在眾生的出生艱難路之渡過上是等同商隊領袖的，在眾生的三種火折磨之熄滅上是等同風的，在眾生的心意之填滿(完成)上是等同大雨雲的，在眾生的善之學習上是等同老師(阿闍梨)的，在眾生的安穩路之告知上是等同善教示者的。

pali: ‘‘ Sīlavā, mahārāja, sīlasampanno agadasamo sattānaṃ kilesavisavināsane, osadhasamo sattānaṃ kilesabyādhivūpasame, udakasamo sattānaṃ kilesarajojallāpaharaṇe, maṇiratanasamo sattānaṃ sabbasampattidāne, nāvāsamo sattānaṃ caturoghapāragamane, satthavāhasamo sattānaṃ jātikantāratāraṇe, vātasamo sattānaṃ tividhaggisantāpanibbāpane, mahāmeghasamo sattānaṃ mānasaparipūraṇe, ācariyasamo sattānaṃ kusalasikkhāpane, sudesakasamo sattānaṃ khemapathamācikkhaṇe.
chinese: 』世尊出於對眾生的憐愍而安立學處：『比丘們！

pali: Evarūpo, mahārāja, bahuguṇo anekaguṇo appamāṇaguṇo guṇarāsi guṇapuñjo sattānaṃ vaḍḍhikaro sīlavā‘ mā vinassī’ ti sattānaṃ anukampāya bhagavā sikkhāpadaṃ paññapesi‘ na, bhikkhave, attānaṃ pātetabbaṃ, yo pāteyya, yathādhammo kāretabbo’ ti.
chinese: 這也被鳩摩羅迦葉上座以種種述說對波亞西親王說明著來世：『親王！

pali: Idamettha, mahārāja, kāraṇaṃ, yena kāraṇena bhagavā paṭikkhipi.

Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, therena kumārakassapena vicitrakathikena pāyāsirājaññassa paralokaṃ dīpayamānena‘ yathā yathā kho rājañña samaṇabrāhmaṇā sīlavanto kalyāṇadhammā ciraṃ dīghamaddhānaṃ tiṭṭhanti, tathā tathā bahuṃ puññaṃ pasavanti, bahujanahitāya ca paṭipajjanti bahujanasukhāya lokānukampāya atthāya hitāya sukhāya devamanussānan’ ti.
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Kena pana kāraṇena bhagavā samādapesi?

Jātipi, mahārāja, dukkhā, jarāpi dukkhā, byādhipi dukkho, maraṇampi dukkhaṃ, sokopi dukkho, paridevopi dukkho, dukkhampi dukkhaṃ, domanassampi dukkhaṃ, upāyāsopi dukkho, appiyehi sampayogopi dukkho, piyehi vippayogopi dukkho, mātumaraṇampi dukkhaṃ, pitumaraṇampi dukkhaṃ, bhātumaraṇampi dukkhaṃ, bhaginimaraṇampi dukkhaṃ, puttamaraṇampi dukkhaṃ, dāramaraṇampi dukkhaṃ, dāsamaraṇampi dukkhaṃ[ idaṃ vākyaṃ sī. pī. potthakesu natthi], ñātimaraṇampi dukkhaṃ, ñātibyasanampi dukkhaṃ, rogabyasanampi dukkhaṃ, bhogabyasanampi dukkhaṃ, sīlabyasanampi dukkhaṃ, diṭṭhibyasanampi dukkhaṃ, rājabhayampi dukkhaṃ, corabhayampi dukkhaṃ, veribhayampi dukkhaṃ, dubbhikkhabhayampi dukkhaṃ, aggibhayampi dukkhaṃ, udakabhayampi dukkhaṃ, ūmibhayampi dukkhaṃ, āvaṭṭabhayampi dukkhaṃ, kumbhīlabhayampi dukkhaṃ, susukābhayampi dukkhaṃ, attānuvādabhayampi dukkhaṃ, parānuvādabhayampi dukkhaṃ, daṇḍabhayampi dukkhaṃ, duggatibhayampi dukkhaṃ, parisāsārajjabhayampi dukkhaṃ, ājīvakabhayampi dukkhaṃ, maraṇabhayampi dukkhaṃ, vettehi tāḷanampi dukkhaṃ, kasāhi tāḷanampi dukkhaṃ, addhadaṇḍakehi tāḷanampi dukkhaṃ, hatthacchedanampi dukkhaṃ, pādacchedanampi dukkhaṃ, hatthapādacchedanampi dukkhaṃ, kaṇṇacchedanampi dukkhaṃ, nāsacchedanampi dukkhaṃ, kaṇṇanāsacchedanampi dukkhaṃ, bilaṅgathālikampi dukkhaṃ, saṅkhamuṇḍikampi dukkhaṃ, rāhumukhampi dukkhaṃ, jotimālikampi dukkhaṃ, hatthapajjotikampi dukkhaṃ, erakavattikampi dukkhaṃ, cīrakavāsikampi dukkhaṃ, eṇeyyakampi dukkhaṃ , baḷisamaṃsikampi dukkhaṃ, kahāpaṇikampi dukkhaṃ, khārāpatacchikampi dukkhaṃ, palighaparivattikampi dukkhaṃ, palālapīṭhakampi dukkhaṃ, tattena telena osiñcanampi dukkhaṃ, sunakhehi khādāpanampi dukkhaṃ, jīvasūlāropanampi dukkhaṃ, asinā sīsacchedanampi dukkhaṃ, evarūpāni, mahārāja, bahuvidhāni anekavidhāni dukkhāni saṃsāragato anubhavati.
chinese: 當說明不流轉的之德性與流轉的之怖畏時，為了不流轉的之作證，為了生老病死之超越，世尊勸導。

pali: ‘ ‘ Yathā, mahārāja, himavantapabbate abhivuṭṭhaṃ udakaṃ gaṅgāya nadiyā pāsāṇa sakkhara khara marumba āvaṭṭa gaggalaka ūmikavaṅkacadika āvaraṇanīvaraṇamūlakasākhāsu pariyottharati, evameva kho, mahārāja, evarūpāni bahuvidhāni anekavidhāni dukkhāni saṃsāragato anubhavati.
chinese: 6.慈之修習效益的問題 [目錄]

pali: Pavattaṃ, mahārāja, dukkhaṃ, appavattaṃ sukhaṃ.
chinese: 這也被世尊說：『比丘們！

pali: Appavattassa guṇaṃ pavattassa[ pavatte( sī. pī. ka.)] ca bhayaṃ dīpayamāno, mahārāja, bhagavā appavattassa sacchikiriyāya jātijarābyādhimaraṇasamatikkamāya samādapesi, idamettha, mahārāja, kāraṇaṃ, yena kāraṇena bhagavā samādapesī’’ ti.
chinese: 在慈心解脫被熟習、被修習、被多作、被作為車輛、被作為基礎、被實行、被累積、被善努力時，十一種效益能被預期，哪十一種？

pali: ‘‘ Sādhu, bhante nāgasena, sunibbeṭhito pañho, sukathitaṃ kāraṇaṃ, evametaṃ tathā sampaṭicchāmī’’ ti.
chinese: 睡得安樂、快樂地醒來、不作惡夢(不見惡夢)、他對人是可愛的、他對非人是可愛的、天神守護、火或毒或刀杖不侵(不走入)、心迅速地入定、面色明淨、死時不迷亂、未貫通更上者是到達梵天世界者。

pali: Attanipātanapañho pañcamo.
6 . Mettābhāvanānisaṃsapañho

6.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena, bhāsitampetaṃ bhagavatā‘ mettāya, bhikkhave, cetovimuttiyā āsevitāya bhāvitāya bahulīkatāya yānīkatāya vatthukatāya anuṭṭhitāya paricitāya susamāraddhāya ekādasānisaṃsā pāṭikaṅkhā.
chinese: [AN.11.15]』又，另一方面，你們說：『慈住者沙摩男童當在山邊散步被鹿群圍繞時，被必里亞葛王以浸毒藥的箭射中，就在那裡昏倒(昏迷、倒下)。

pali: Katame ekādasa?

Sukhaṃ supati, sukhaṃ paṭibujjhati , na pāpakaṃ supinaṃ passati, manussānaṃ piyo hoti, amanussānaṃ piyo hoti, devatā rakkhanti, nāssa aggi vā visaṃ vā satthaṃ vā kamati[ satthaṃ kamati( syā.) a. ni.11.15 passitabbaṃ], tuvaṭaṃ cittaṃ samādhiyati, mukhavaṇṇo vippasīdati, asammūḷho kālaṃ karoti, uttariṃ appaṭivijjhanto brahmalokūpago hotī’ ti.
chinese: 如果慈住者沙摩男童當在山邊散步被鹿群圍繞時，被必里亞葛王以浸毒藥的箭射中，就在那裡昏倒，那樣的話，『比丘們！

pali: Puna ca tumhe bhaṇatha‘ sāmo kumāro mettāvihārī migasaṅghena parivuto pavane vicaranto pīḷiyakkhena raññā viddho visapītena sallena tattheva mucchito patito’ ti.
chinese: 』那個言語也是錯誤的。

pali: ‘ ‘ Yadi , bhante nāgasena, bhagavatā bhaṇitaṃ‘ mettāya bhikkhave… pe… brahmalokūpago hotī’ ti, tena hi‘‘ sāmo kumāro mettāvihārī migasaṅghena parivuto pavane vicaranto pīḷiyakkhena raññā viddho visapītena sallena tattheva mucchito patito’ ti yaṃ vacanaṃ, taṃ micchā.
chinese: 這也被世尊說：『比丘們！

pali: Yadi sāmo kumāro mettāvihārī migasaṅghena parivuto pavane vicaranto pīḷiyakkhena raññā viddho visapītena sallena tattheva mucchito patito, tena hi‘ mettāya, bhikkhave… pe… satthaṃ vā kamatī’ ti tampi vacanaṃ micchā.
chinese: 在那裡，什麼理由呢？

pali: Ayampi ubhato koṭiko pañho sunipuṇo parisaṇho sukhumo gambhīro, api sunipuṇānaṃ manujānaṃ gatte sedaṃ moceyya, so tavānuppatto, vijaṭehi taṃ mahājaṭājaṭitaṃ, anāgatānaṃ jinaputtānaṃ cakkhuṃ dehi nibbāhanāyā’’ ti.
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā‘ mettāya bhikkhave… pe.
chinese: 凡在剎那個人是慈具足者，在那剎那，火或毒或刀對那位個人不影響，凡任何想要對他傷害者接近後他們沒看見他，他們在他之上沒得到機會。

pali: satthaṃ vā kamatī’ ti.
Sāmo ca kumāro mettāvihārī migasaṅghena parivuto pavane vicaranto pīḷiyakkhena raññā viddho visapītena sallena tattheva mucchito patito, tattha pana, mahārāja, kāraṇaṃ atthi.
chinese: 這裡，如果戰場勇士之男子綁緊不能被破壞的鎧甲後進入戰場，被投擲的箭矢接近後它們落下、散落，它們在他之上沒得到機會。

pali: Katamaṃ tattha kāraṇaṃ?
Nete, mahārāja, guṇā puggalassa, mettābhāvanāyete guṇā, sāmo, mahārāja, kumāro ghaṭaṃ ukkhipanto tasmiṃ khaṇe mettābhāvanāya pamatto ahosi.
chinese: 這不是戰場勇士的德性，這是不能被破壞的鎧甲之德性：凡被投擲的箭矢對他接近後它們落下、散落。

pali: ‘ ‘ Yasmiṃ, mahārāja, khaṇe puggalo mettaṃ samāpanno hoti, na tassa puggalassa tasmiṃ khaṇe aggi vā visaṃ vā satthaṃ vā kamati.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Tassa ye keci ahitakāmā upagantvā taṃ na passanti, na tasmiṃ okāsaṃ labhanti.
Nete, mahārāja, guṇā puggalassa, mettābhāvanāyete guṇā.
chinese: 凡在剎那個人是慈具足者，在那剎那，火或毒或刀對那位個人不影響，凡任何想要對他傷害者接近後他們沒看見他，他們在他之上沒得到機會。

pali: Idha, mahārāja, puriso saṅgāmasūro abhejjakavacajālikaṃ sannayhitvā saṅgāmaṃ otareyya, tassa sarā khittā upagantvā patanti vikiranti, na tasmiṃ okāsaṃ labhanti, neso, mahārāja, guṇo saṅgāmasūrassa, abhejjakavacajālikāyeso guṇo, yassa sarā khittā upagantvā patanti vikiranti.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Evameva kho, mahārāja, nete guṇā puggalassa, mettābhāvanāyete guṇā.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Yasmiṃ , mahārāja, khaṇe puggalo mettaṃ samāpanno hoti, na tassa puggalassa tasmiṃ khaṇe aggi vā visaṃ vā satthaṃ vā kamati.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Tassa ye keci ahitakāmā upagantvā taṃ na passanti, tasmiṃ okāsaṃ na labhanti, nete , mahārāja, guṇā puggalassa, mettābhāvanāyete guṇā.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Idha pana, mahārāja, puriso dibbaṃ antaradhānaṃ mūlaṃ hatthe kareyya, yāva taṃ mūlaṃ tassa hatthagataṃ hoti, tāva na añño koci pakatimanusso taṃ purisaṃ passati.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Neso, mahārāja, guṇo purisassa, mūlasseso guṇo antaradhānassa, yaṃ so pakatimanussānaṃ cakkhupathe na dissati.
chinese: 這不是個人的德性，這是慈的修習之德性。

pali: Evameva kho, mahārāja, nete guṇā puggalassa, mettābhāvanāyete guṇā.
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Yasmiṃ, mahārāja, khaṇe puggalo mettaṃ samāpanno hoti, na tassa puggalassa tasmiṃ khaṇe aggi vā visaṃ vā satthaṃ vā kamati.
chinese: 凡在剎那個人是慈具足者，在那剎那，火或毒或刀對那位個人不影響，凡任何想要對他傷害者接近後他們沒看見他，他們在他之上沒得到機會。

pali: Tassa ye keci ahitakāmā upagantvā taṃ na passanti, na tasmiṃ okāsaṃ labhanti.
chinese: 」「不可思議啊，那先大德！

pali: Nete, mahārāja, guṇā puggalassa, mettābhāvanāyete guṇā.
chinese: 未曾有啊，那先大德！

pali: Yathā vā pana, mahārāja, purisaṃ sukataṃ mahāleṇamanuppaviṭṭhaṃ mahatimahāmegho abhivassanto na sakkoti temayituṃ, neso, mahārāja, guṇo purisassa, mahāleṇasseso guṇo, yaṃ mahāmegho abhivassamāno na taṃ temeti.
chinese: 慈之修習效益的問題第六。

pali: Evameva kho, mahārāja, nete guṇā puggalassa, mettābhāvanāyete guṇā.
chinese: 7.善不善等不等同的問題 [目錄]

pali: ‘ ‘ Yasmiṃ, mahārāja, khaṇe puggalo mettaṃ samāpanno hoti, na tassa puggalassa tasmiṃ khaṇe aggi vā visaṃ vā satthaṃ vā kamati.
chinese: 有善的與不善的之差別。

pali: Tassa ye keci ahitakāmā upagantvā taṃ na passanti, na tassa sakkonti ahitaṃ kātuṃ nete, mahārāja, guṇā puggalassa, mettābhāvanāyete guṇā’’ ti.
chinese: 「那先大德！

pali: ‘‘ Acchariyaṃ, bhante nāgasena, abbhutaṃ bhante nāgasena, sabbapāpanivāraṇā mettābhāvanā’’ ti.
chinese: 你們說：『提婆達多是一向黑的，具備一向黑的法，菩薩是一向白(淨)的，具備一向白的法。

pali: ‘‘ Sabbakusalaguṇāvahā, mahārāja, mettābhāvanā hitānampi ahitānampi, ye te sattā viññāṇabaddhā, sabbesaṃ mahānisaṃsā mettābhāvanā saṃvibhajitabbā’’ ti.
chinese: 』又，另一方面，提婆達多在一一有(生)中，以名聲與黨翼與菩薩是完全相同的，有時或是更優勝的。

pali: Mettābhāvanānisaṃsapañho chaṭṭho.
7 . Kusalākusalasamavisamapañho
7.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena‘ kusalakārissapi akusalakārissapi vipāko samasamo, udāhu koci viseso atthī’ ti?
chinese: 當提婆達多在波羅奈城中為梵施王祭司的兒子時，那時菩薩為低下的旃陀羅持明咒者，呢喃明咒後生出非時芒果[Jat.474]，在那裡，就只那些，菩薩比提婆達多，以出生為卑賤者與以名聲為卑賤者。

pali: ‘‘ Atthi, mahārāja, kusalassa ca akusalassa ca viseso, kusalaṃ, mahārāja, sukhavipākaṃ saggasaṃvattanikaṃ, akusalaṃ dukkhavipākaṃ nirayasaṃvattanikan’’ ti.
chinese: 再者，當提婆達多是國王、大地的主人、一切欲的具備者時，那時，菩薩是他受用的大象，具足一切相。

pali: ‘ ‘ Bhante nāgasena, tumhe bhaṇatha‘ devadatto ekantakaṇho, ekantakaṇhehi dhammehi samannāgato, bodhisatto ekantasukko, ekantasukkehi dhammehi samannāgato’ ti.
chinese: 大象是未從你學得的，請你對牠作名為空中行走的行為(懲罰?)。

pali: Puna ca devadatto bhave bhave yasena ca pakkhena ca bodhisattena samasamo hoti, kadāci adhikataro vā.
chinese: [Jat.122]』也在那裡，就只那些，菩薩比提婆達多，以出生為卑賤者：落入畜生的劣等者。

pali: Yadā devadatto nagare bārāṇasiyaṃ brahmadattassa rañño purohitaputto ahosi, tadā bodhisatto chavakacaṇḍālo ahosi vijjādharo, vijjaṃ parijappitvā akāle ambaphalāni nibbattesi, ettha tāva bodhisatto devadattato jātiyā nihīno yasena ca nihīno.
chinese: 再者，當提婆達多是人，為在山邊的破產者時，那時，菩薩是大地的猿猴[Jat.516]。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto rājā ahosi mahā mahīpati sabbakāmasamaṅgī, tadā bodhisatto tassūpabhogo ahosi hatthināgo sabbalakkhaṇasampanno, tassa cārugativilāsaṃ asahamāno rājā vadhamicchanto hatthācariyaṃ evamavoca‘ asikkhito te, ācariya, hatthināgo, tassa ākāsagamanaṃ nāma kāraṇaṃ karohī’ ti, tatthapi tāva bodhisatto devadattato jātiyā nihīno lāmako tiracchānagato.
chinese: 也在那裡，就只那些，提婆達多正是更優勝者。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto manusso ahosi pavane naṭṭhāyiko, tadā bodhisatto mahāpathavī nāma makkaṭo ahosi, etthapi tāva dissati viseso manussassa ca tiracchānagatassa ca, tatthapi tāva bodhisatto devadattato jātiyā nihīno.
chinese: 也在那裡，就只那些，提婆達多以出生正是更優勝者。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto manusso ahosi soṇuttaro nāma nesādo balavā balavataro nāgabalo, tadā bodhisatto chaddanto nāma nāgarājā ahosi.
chinese: 那時，那位國王成為對那位苦行者的發怒者，他如竹筍般地切斷手腳。

pali: Tadā so luddako taṃ hatthināgaṃ ghātesi, tatthapi tāva devadattova adhikataro.
chinese: 也在那裡，就只那些，提婆達多以出生與以名聲就是更優勝者。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto manusso ahosi vanacarako aniketavāsī, tadā bodhisatto sakuṇo ahosi tittiro mantajjhāyī, tadāpi so vanacarako taṃ sakuṇaṃ ghātesi, tatthapi tāva devadattova jātiyā adhikataro.
chinese: 那時，那位林中活動者殺害那隻猴王，連同母親與弟弟。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto kalābu nāma kāsirājā[ kāsikarājā( ka.)] ahosi, tadā bodhisatto tāpaso ahosi khantivādī.
chinese: 也在那裡，就只那些，提婆達多以出生就是更優勝者。

pali: Tadā so rājā tassa tāpasassa kuddho hatthapāde vaṃsakaḷīre viya chedāpesi, tatthapi tāva devadatto yeva adhikataro jātiyā ca yasena ca.
chinese: 也在那裡，就只那些，提婆達多以出生就是更優勝者。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto manusso ahosi vanacaro, tadā bodhisatto nandiyo nāma vānarindo ahosi, tadāpi so vanacaro taṃ vānarindaṃ ghātesi saddhiṃ mātarā kaniṭṭhabhātikena ca, tatthapi tāva devadatto yeva adhikataro jātiyā.
chinese: 也在那裡，就只那些，提婆達多以出生就是更優勝者。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto manusso ahosi acelako kārambhiyo nāma, tadā bodhisatto paṇḍarako nāma nāgarājā ahosi, tatthapi tāva devadatto yeva adhikataro jātiyā.
chinese: 再者，當提婆達多是在支提中名為蘇勒巴哩者勒的國王，在人高度上之空中處的空中行走者時，那時，菩薩是名為葛逼拉的婆羅門[Jat.422]。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto manusso ahosi pavane jaṭilako, tadā bodhisatto tacchako nāma mahāsūkaro ahosi, tatthapi tāva devadatto yeva jātiyā adhikataro.
chinese: 再者，當提婆達多是人，名為沙麼時，那時，菩薩是名為魯魯的鹿王[Jat.482]。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto cetīsu sūraparicaro nāma rājā ahosi upari purisamatte gagane vehāsaṅgamo, tadā bodhisatto kapilo nāma brāhmaṇo ahosi, tatthapi tāva devadatto yeva adhikataro jātiyā ca yasena ca.
chinese: 再者，當提婆達多是人，為山邊活動的獵人時，那時，菩薩是大象[Jat.72]，那位獵人七次切斷那頭大象的象牙後取走。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto manusso ahosi sāmo nāma, tadā bodhisatto ruru nāma migarājā ahosi, tatthapi tāva devadatto yeva jātiyā adhikataro.
chinese: 也在那裡，就只那些，提婆達多以胎就是更優勝者。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto manusso ahosi luddako pavanacaro, tadā bodhisatto hatthināgo ahosi, so luddako tassa hatthināgassa sattakkhattuṃ dante chinditvā hari, tatthapi tāva devadatto yeva yoniyā adhikataro.
chinese: 也在那裡，就只那些，提婆達多以名聲就是更優勝者。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto siṅgālo ahosi khattiyadhammo, so yāvatā jambudīpe padesarājāno te sabbe anuyutte akāsi, tadā bodhisatto vidhuro nāma paṇḍito ahosi, tatthapi tāva devadatto yeva yasena adhikataro.
chinese: 在那裡，就只那些，他們兩者是完全相同的。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto hatthināgo hutvā laṭukikāya sakuṇikāya puttake ghātesi, tadā bodhisattopi hatthināgo ahosi yūthapati, tattha tāva ubhopi te samasamā ahesuṃ.
chinese: 也在那裡，就只那些，他們兩者也是完全相同的。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto yakkho ahosi adhammo nāma, tadā bodhisattopi yakkho ahosi dhammo nāma, tatthapi tāva ubhopi samasamā ahesuṃ.
chinese: 也在那裡，就只那些，他們兩者也是完全相同的。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto nāviko ahosi pañcannaṃ kulasatānaṃ issaro, tadā bodhisattopi nāviko ahosi pañcannaṃ kulasatānaṃ issaro, tatthapi tāva ubhopi samasamā ahesuṃ.
chinese: 也在那裡，就只那些，他們兩者也是完全相同的。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto satthavāho ahosi pañcannaṃ sakaṭasatānaṃ issaro, tadā bodhisattopi satthavāho ahosi pañcannaṃ sakaṭasatānaṃ issaro, tatthapi tāva ubhopi samasamā ahesuṃ.
chinese: 也在那裡，就只那些，他們兩者也是完全相同的。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto sākho nāma migarājā ahosi, tadā bodhisattopi nigrodho nāma migarājā ahosi, tatthapi tāva ubhopi samasamā ahesuṃ.
chinese: 再者，當提婆達多是名為沙柯的將軍時，那時，菩薩是國王，也名為尼拘律[Jat.445]。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto sākho nāma senāpati ahosi, tadā bodhisattopi nigrodho nāma rājā ahosi, tatthapi tāva ubhopi samasamā ahesuṃ.
chinese: 再者，當提婆達多是名為柯達哈拉的婆羅門時，那時，菩薩是名為匠達的王子[Jat.542]。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto khaṇḍahālo nāma brāhmaṇo ahosi, tadā bodhisatto cando nāma rājakumāro ahosi, tadā so khaṇḍahālo yeva adhikataro.
chinese: 再者，當提婆達多是名為梵施的國王時，那時，菩薩是他的兒子，名為大紅蓮王子[Jat.472]。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto brahmadatto nāma rājā ahosi, tadā bodhisatto tassa putto mahāpadumo nāma kumāro ahosi, tadā so rājā sakaputtaṃ corapapāte khipāpesi, yato kutoci pitāva puttānaṃ adhikataro hoti visiṭṭhoti, tatthapi tāva devadatto yeva adhikataro.
chinese: 那時，那位國王使自己的兒子在盜賊斷崖投擲(擲下)，由於在任何地方父親比兒子都是更優勝者、殊勝者，也在那裡，就只那些，提婆達多就是更優勝者。

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna caparaṃ yadā devadatto mahāpatāpo nāma rājā ahosi, tadā bodhisatto tassa putto dhammapālo nāma kumāro ahosi, tadā so rājā sakaputtassa hatthapāde sīsañca chedāpesi, tatthapi tāva devadatto yeva uttaro adhikataro.
chinese: 凡被我說的，是否一切都是真實的，還是離真實的呢？

pali: Ajjetarahi ubhopi sakyakule jāyiṃsu.
chinese: 「大王！

pali: Bodhisatto buddho ahosi sabbaññū lokanāyako, devadatto tassa devātidevassa sāsane pabbajitvā iddhiṃ nibbattetvā buddhālayaṃ akāsi.
chinese: 如果黑的、白的都是趣完全相同的，那樣的話，善的、不善的都有完全相同的果報？

pali: Kiṃ nu kho, bhante nāgasena, yaṃ mayā bhaṇitaṃ, taṃ sabbaṃ tathaṃ udāhu vitathan’’ ti?
chinese: 善的、不善的並沒有完全相同的果報。

pali: ‘ ‘ Yaṃ tvaṃ, mahārāja, bahuvidhaṃ kāraṇaṃ osāresi, sabbaṃ taṃ tatheva, no aññathā’’ ti.
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘‘ Yadi, bhante nāgasena, kaṇhopi sukkopi samasamagatikā honti, tena hi kusalampi akusalampi samasamavipākaṃ hotī’’ ti?
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, mahārāja, kusalampi akusalampi samasamavipākaṃ hoti, na hi, mahārāja, devadatto sabbajanehi paṭiviruddho, bodhisatteneva paṭiviruddho.
chinese: 提婆達多當在統治權上住立時，在地方上給與守護：使建立橋、集會所、福德會堂，施與沙門、婆羅門、貧窮者、旅行者、流浪者布施，以他的那個果報在一一有中得到成就。

pali: Yo tassa bodhisattena paṭiviruddho, so tasmiṃ tasmiṃ yeva bhave paccati phalaṃ deti.
chinese: 誰能說這個：『以缺布施、調御、抑制、布薩行為，他將會經驗成就？

pali: Devadattopi, mahārāja, issariye ṭhito janapadesu ārakkhaṃ deti, setuṃ sabhaṃ puññasālaṃ kāreti, samaṇabrāhmaṇānaṃ kapaṇaddhikavaṇibbakānaṃ nāthānāthānaṃ yathāpaṇihitaṃ dānaṃ deti.
chinese: 』那非經過百生有會合，非經過千生，非經過十萬(百千)生，偶爾經過許多日夜有會合。

pali: Tassa so vipākena bhave bhave sampattiyo paṭilabhati.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Kassetaṃ, mahārāja, sakkā vattuṃ vinā dānena damena saṃyamena uposathakammena sampattiṃ anubhavissatīti?
chinese: 請你對這些會合持像那樣的比喻。

pali: ‘ ‘ Yaṃ pana tvaṃ, mahārāja, evaṃ vadesi‘ devadatto ca bodhisatto ca ekato anuparivattantī’ ti, so na jātisatassa accayena samāgamo ahosi, na jātisahassassa accayena, na jātisatasahassassa accayena, kadāci karahaci bahūnaṃ ahorattānaṃ accayena samāgamo ahosi.
chinese: 菩薩也在好幾十萬生中是舍利弗上座的父親、伯父、叔父、兄弟、兒子、外甥、朋友。

pali: Yaṃ panetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā kāṇakacchapopamaṃ upadassitaṃ manussattappaṭilābhāya, tathūpamaṃ, mahārāja, imesaṃ samāgamaṃ dhārehi.
chinese: 繫屬眾生類的一切都落入輪迴之流，被輪迴之流流走，與不可愛的也與可愛的會合。

pali: ‘ ‘ Na, mahārāja, bodhisattassa devadatteneva saddhiṃ samāgamo ahosi, theropi, mahārāja, sāriputto anekesu jātisatasahassesu bodhisattassa pitā ahosi, mahāpitā ahosi, cūḷapitā ahosi , bhātā ahosi, putto ahosi, bhāgineyyo ahosi, mitto ahosi.
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Bodhisattopi, mahārāja, anekesu jātisatasahassesu therassa sāriputtassa pitā ahosi, mahāpitā ahosi, cūḷapitā ahosi, bhātā ahosi, putto ahosi, bhāgineyyo ahosi , mitto ahosi, sabbepi, mahārāja, sattanikāyapariyāpannā saṃsārasotamanugatā saṃsārasotena vuyhantā appiyehipi piyehipi samāgacchanti.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Yathā, mahārāja, udakaṃ sotena vuyhamānaṃ suciasucikalyāṇapāpakena samāgacchati, evameva kho, mahārāja, sabbepi sattanikāyapariyāpannā saṃsārasotamanugatā saṃsārasotena vuyhantā appiyehipi piyehipi samāgacchanti.

Devadatto, mahārāja, yakkho samāno attanā adhammo pare adhamme niyojetvā sattapaññāsavassakoṭiyo saṭṭhi ca vassasatasahassāni mahāniraye pacci , bodhisattopi, mahārāja, yakkho samāno attanā dhammo pare dhamme niyojetvā sattapaññāsavassakoṭiyo saṭṭhi ca vassasatasahassāni sagge modi sabbakāmasamaṅgī, api ca, mahārāja, devadatto imasmiṃ bhave buddhaṃ anāsādanīyamāsādayitvā samaggañca saṅghaṃ bhinditvā pathaviṃ pāvisi, tathāgato bujjhitvā sabbadhamme parinibbuto upadhisaṅkhaye’’ ti.
chinese: 置丈夫等同國王後，當被千金邀請時也不作惡。

pali: ‘‘ Sādhu, bhante nāgasena, evametaṃ tathā sampaṭicchāmī’’ ti.
chinese: 如果『如果……（中略）一起。

pali: Kusalākusalasamavisamapañho sattamo.
8 . Amarādevīpañho
chinese: 』被世尊說，那樣的話，『摩侯沙達的妻子……（中略）不作惡。

pali: 8.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena, bhāsitampetaṃ bhagavatā–
chinese: 』該言語是錯誤的。

pali: ‘ ‘‘ Sace labhetha khaṇaṃ vā raho vā, nimantakaṃ[ nivātakaṃ( kuṇālajātake)] vāpi labhetha tādisaṃ;
chinese: 』那樣的話，『如果……（中略）一起。

pali: Sabbāva [ sabbāpi( sī. pī.)] itthī kayiruṃ[ kareyyuṃ( sī. pī. ka.)] nu pāpaṃ, aññaṃ aladdhā pīṭhasappinā saddhin’ ti.
chinese: 「大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Puna ca kathīyati‘ mahosadhassa bhariyā amarā nāma itthī gāmake ṭhapitā pavutthapatikā raho nisinnā vivittā rājappaṭisamaṃ sāmikaṃ karitvā sahassena nimantīyamānā pāpaṃ nākāsī’ ti.
chinese: [這是關於]當那位婦女得到千金時，可能與像那樣的男子一起作惡行？

pali: Yadi, bhante nāgasena, bhagavatā bhaṇitaṃ‘ sace… pe… saddhin’ ti tena hi‘ mahosadhassa bhariyā… pe… nākāsī’ ti yaṃ vacanaṃ, taṃ micchā.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Yadi mahosadhassa bhariyā… pe… nākāsi, tena hi‘ sace… pe… saddhin’ ti tampi vacanaṃ micchā.
chinese: 當那位阿瑪勒婦女考察時，她沒看見適當時機或隱密或甚至像那樣的邀請者。

pali: Ayampi ubhato koṭiko pañho tavānuppatto, so tayā nibbāhitabbo’’ ti.
chinese: 這裡，在[此]世以責駡的怖畏她沒看見適當時機。

pali: ‘ ‘ Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā‘ sace… pe… saddhin’ ti.
chinese: 『辛辣果報之惡』她沒看見適當時機。

pali: Kathīyati ca‘ mahosadhassa bhariyā … pe… nākāsī’ ti.
chinese: 不想要脫離所愛的她沒看見適當時機。

pali: Kareyya sā, mahārāja, itthī sahassaṃ labhamānā tādisena purisena saddhiṃ pāpakammaṃ, na sā kareyya sace khaṇaṃ vā raho vā nimantakaṃ vāpi tādisaṃ labheyya, vicinantī sā, mahārāja, amarā itthī na addasa khaṇaṃ vā raho vā nimantakaṃ vāpi tādisaṃ.
chinese: 以像這樣許多理由她沒看見適當時機。

pali: ‘ ‘ Idha loke garahabhayā khaṇaṃ na passi, paraloke nirayabhayā khaṇaṃ na passi, kaṭukavipākaṃ pāpanti khaṇaṃ na passi, piyaṃ amuñcitukāmā khaṇaṃ na passi, sāmikassa garukatāya khaṇaṃ na passi, dhammaṃ apacāyantī khaṇaṃ na passi, anariyaṃ garahantī khaṇaṃ na passi, kiriyaṃ abhinditukāmā khaṇaṃ na passi.
chinese: 如果從知他心的出家者得到隱密，那時沒從知他心的天神得到隱密。

pali: Evarūpehi bahūhi kāraṇehi khaṇaṃ na passi.
chinese: 如果從知他心的天神得到隱密，沒從就是自己的惡得到隱密。

pali: ‘ ‘ Rahopi sā loke vicinitvā apassantī pāpaṃ nākāsi.
chinese: 如果就是從自己的惡得到隱密，那時以非法沒得到隱密。

pali: Sace sā manussehi raho labheyya, atha amanussehi raho na labheyya.
chinese: 以像這樣許多理由沒得到隱密後她不作惡。

pali: Sace amanussehi raho labheyya, atha paracittavidūhi pabbajitehi raho na labheyya.
chinese: 她在世間中也考察邀請者後，當沒得到像那樣者時她不作惡：大王！

pali: Sace paracittavidūhi pabbajitehi raho labheyya, atha paracittavidūnīhi devatāhi raho na labheyya.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Sace paracittavidūnīhi devatāhi raho labheyya, attanāva pāpehi raho na labheyya.
Sace attanāva pāpehi raho labheyya, atha adhammena raho na labheyya.
Evarūpehi bahuvidhehi kāraṇehi raho alabhitvā pāpaṃ nākāsi.
chinese: 摩侯沙達是勇士、慚者、愧者、有黨翼者、具足朋友者、容忍者、持戒者、實語者、具足淨行者、不憤怒者、不極慢者、不嫉妒者、有活力者、努力者、利益者、分享者、親切者、謙遜生活者、柔軟者、不詐欺者、無欺騙者、具足極聰慧者、有名聲者、具足明者、利他者、祈望對所有人緊密結交者、富有者、有名聲者，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Nimantakampi sā loke vicinitvā tādisaṃ alabhantī pāpaṃ nākāsi.
Mahosadho, mahārāja, paṇḍito aṭṭhavīsatiyā aṅgehi samannāgato.
Katamehi aṭṭhavīsatiyā aṅgehi samannāgato?

Mahosadho, mahārāja, sūro hirimā ottappī sapakkho mittasampanno khamo sīlavā saccavādī soceyyasampanno akkodhano anatimānī anusūyako vīriyavā āyūhako saṅgāhako saṃvibhāgī sakhilo nivātavutti saṇho asaṭho amāyāvī atibuddhisampanno kittimā vijjāsampanno hitesī upanissitānaṃ patthito sabbajanassa dhanavā yasavā.
chinese: 這也被世尊說：『阿羅漢是已離恐懼害怕者。

pali: Mahosadho, mahārāja, paṇḍito imehi aṭṭhavīsatiyā aṅgehi samannāgato.
Sā aññaṃ tādisaṃ nimantakaṃ alabhitvā pāpaṃ nākāsī’’ ti.
chinese: 』又，另一方面，在王舍城當達納巴拉葛象落下向世尊時，看見後，五百位漏已滅盡者遍捨殊勝的勝者後向四面八方走開，除阿難上座一位外[AA.18.5]。

pali: ‘‘ Sādhu, bhante nāgasena, evametaṃ tathā sampaṭicchāmī’’ ti.
Amarādevīpañho aṭṭhamo.
chinese: 那先大德！

pali: 9 . Arahantaabhāyanapañho
9.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena, bhāsitampetaṃ bhagavatā‘ vigatabhayasantāsā arahanto’ ti.
chinese: 是否那些阿羅漢被以恐懼走開，[或]『將會被自己的業知道。

pali: Puna ca nagare rājagahe dhanapālakaṃ hatthiṃ bhagavati opatantaṃ disvā pañca khīṇāsavasatāni pariccajitvā jinavaraṃ pakkantāni disāvidisaṃ ekaṃ ṭhapetvā theraṃ ānandaṃ.
chinese: 如果這被世尊說：『阿羅漢是已離恐懼害怕者。

pali: Kiṃ nu kho, bhante nāgasena, te arahanto bhayā pakkantā, paññāyissati sakena kammenāti dasabalaṃ pātetukāmā pakkantā , udāhu tathāgatassa atulaṃ vipulamasamaṃ pāṭihāriyaṃ daṭṭhukāmā pakkantā?
chinese: 如果在王舍城當達納巴拉葛象落下向世尊時，看見後，五百位漏已滅盡者遍捨殊勝的勝者後向四面八方走開，除阿難上座一位外，那樣的話，『阿羅漢是已離恐懼害怕者。

pali: Yadi, bhante nāgasena, bhagavatā bhaṇitaṃ‘ vigatabhayasantāsā arahanto’ ti, tena hi‘ nagare… pe… ānandan’ ti yaṃ vacanaṃ taṃ micchā.
chinese: 』那個言語也是錯誤的。

pali: Yadi nagare rājagahe dhanapālakaṃ hatthiṃ bhagavati opatantaṃ disvā pañca khīṇāsavasatāni pariccajitvā jinavaraṃ pakkantāni disāvidisaṃ ekaṃ ṭhapetvā theraṃ ānandaṃ, tena hi‘ vigatabhayasantāsā arahanto’ ti tampi vacanaṃ micchā.
chinese: 』在王舍城當達納巴拉葛象落下向世尊時，看見後，五百位漏已滅盡者遍捨殊勝的勝者後向四面八方走開，除阿難上座一位外，但那非以恐懼，也非為了想要使世尊倒下。

pali: Ayampi ubhato koṭiko pañho tavānuppatto, so tayā nibbāhitabbo’’ ti.

‘ ‘ Bhāsitampetaṃ, mahārāja, bhagavatā‘ vigatabhayasantāsā arahanto’ ti, nagare rājagahe dhanapālakaṃ hatthiṃ bhagavati opatantaṃ disvā pañca khīṇāsavasatāni pariccajitvā jinavaraṃ pakkantāni disāvidisaṃ ekaṃ ṭhapetvā theraṃ ānandaṃ, tañca pana na bhayā, nāpi bhagavantaṃ pātetukāmatāya.
chinese: 這確實不是。

pali: ‘ ‘ Yena pana, mahārāja, hetunā arahanto bhāyeyyuṃ vā tāseyyuṃ vā, so hetu arahantānaṃ samucchinno, tasmā vigatabhayasantāsā arahanto, bhāyati nu, mahārāja, mahāpathavī khaṇantepi bhindantepi dhārentepi samuddapabbatagirisikhareti?
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante’’ ti.
‘‘ Kena kāraṇena mahārājā’’ ti?
chinese: 當切斷或劈開或弄倒以火燒時，峰頂是否恐懼呢？

pali: ‘‘ Natthi, bhante, mahāpathaviyā so hetu, yena hetunā mahāpathavī bhāyeyya vā tāseyya vā’’ ti.
chinese: 」「大德！

pali: ‘‘ Evameva kho, mahārāja, natthi arahantānaṃ so hetu, yena hetunā arahanto bhāyeyyuṃ vā tāseyyuṃ vā.
chinese: 」「同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Bhāyati nu, mahārāja, girisikharaṃ chindante vā bhindante vā patante vā agginā dahante vā’’ ti?
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘‘ Na hi, bhante’’ ti.
‘‘ Kena kāraṇena mahārājā’’ ti?
chinese: 又，在十萬世間界中，如果凡任何繫屬眾生類的他們全部都以手中之刀圍繞一位阿羅漢後想要使之顫抖，但阿羅漢的心不會恐懼，沒有任何變異。

pali: ‘‘ Natthi, bhante, girisikharassa so hetu, yena hetunā girisikharaṃ bhāyeyya vā tāseyya vā’’ ti.
chinese: 什麼原因呢？

pali: ‘‘ Evameva kho, mahārāja, natthi arahantānaṃ so hetu, yena hetunā arahanto bhāyeyyuṃ vā tāseyyuṃ vā.
chinese: 大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Yadipi , mahārāja, lokadhātusatasahassesu ye keci sattanikāyapariyāpannā sabbepi te sattihatthā ekaṃ arahantaṃ upadhāvitvā tāseyyuṃ, na bhaveyya arahato cittassa kiñci aññathattaṃ.
Kiṃ kāraṇaṃ?
chinese: 此外，心深思的那些漏已滅盡者想這個：『現在，在人中之殊勝者、最頂尖者，殊勝之勝者牛王隨進入殊勝的城市時，在街道上達納巴拉葛象將衝來，無疑地天中天的隨侍將不會遍捨，如果我們全部將不遍捨世尊，則阿難的德性將不會成為眾所周知的，且大像也將不會接近如來，來吧，讓我們離開，這樣，將會有這大群人的污染繫縛之解脫，以及阿難的德性將會成為眾所周知的。

pali: Aṭṭhānamanavakāsatāya.

‘ ‘ Api ca, mahārāja, tesaṃ khīṇāsavānaṃ evaṃ cetoparivitakko ahosi‘ ajja naravarapavare jinavaravasabhe nagaravaramanuppaviṭṭhe vīthiyā dhanapālako hatthī āpatissati, asaṃsayamatidevadevaṃ upaṭṭhāko na pariccajissati, yadi mayaṃ sabbepi bhagavantaṃ na pariccajissāma, ānandassa guṇo pākaṭo na bhavissati, na heva ca tathāgataṃ samupagamissati hatthināgo, handa mayaṃ apagacchāma, evamidaṃ mahato janakāyassa kilesabandhanamokkho bhavissati, ānandassa ca guṇo pākaṭo bhavissatī’ ti.
chinese: 10.佛一切知性的問題 [目錄]

pali: Evaṃ te arahanto ānisaṃsaṃ disvā disāvidisaṃ pakkantā’’ ti.
chinese: 你們說：『如來是一切知者。

pali: ‘‘ Suvibhatto, bhante nāgasena, pañho, evametaṃ natthi arahantānaṃ bhayaṃ vā santāso vā, ānisaṃsaṃ disvā arahanto pakkantā disāvidisan’’ ti.
chinese: 』又，另一方面，你們說：『在以舍利弗、目揵連為上首的比丘僧團被如來遣離時，遮堵瑪的釋迦族與梵王娑婆主以種子之譬喻與犢子之譬喻明說後，使世尊明淨，使之原諒，作歡喜接受。

pali: Arahantaabhāyanapañho navamo.
10 . Buddhasabbaññubhāvapañho
10.‘‘ Bhante nāgasena, tumhe bhaṇatha‘ tathāgato sabbaññū’ ti.
chinese: [MN.67]』那先大德！

pali: Puna ca bhaṇatha‘ tathāgatena sāriputtamoggallānappamukhe bhikkhusaṅghe paṇāmite cātumeyyakā ca sakyā brahmā ca sahampati bījūpamañca vacchataruṇūpamañca upadassetvā bhagavantaṃ pasādesuṃ khamāpesuṃ nijjhattaṃ akaṃsū’ ti.
chinese: 如果對如來是那些譬喻的不了知者，那樣的話，佛陀不是一切知者。

pali: Kiṃ nu kho, bhante nāgasena, aññātā tā upamā tathāgatassa, yāhi tathāgato upamāhi orato khamito upasanto nijjhattaṃ gato?
chinese: 如果是了知者，那樣的話，拉離、強迫、思察後遣離，那樣的話，他的無悲愍生成。

pali: Yadi, bhante nāgasena, tathāgatassa tā upamā aññātā, tena hi buddho asabbaññū, yadi ñātā, tena hi okassa pasayha vīmaṃsāpekkho paṇāmesi, tena hi tassa akāruññatā sambhavati.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Ayampi ubhato koṭiko pañho tavānuppatto, so tayā nibbāhitabbo’’ ti.
‘ ‘ Sabbaññū, mahārāja, tathāgato, tāhi ca upamāhi bhagavā pasanno orato khamito upasanto nijjhattaṃ gato.
chinese: 大王！

pali: Dhammassāmī, mahārāja, tathāgato, tathāgatappavediteheva te opammehi tathāgataṃ ārādhesuṃ tosesuṃ pasādesuṃ, tesañca tathāgato pasanno‘ sādhū’ ti abbhānumodi.
chinese: 』同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Yathā, mahārāja, itthī sāmikassa santakeneva dhanena sāmikaṃ ārādheti toseti pasādeti, tañca sāmiko‘ sādhū’ ti abbhānumodati, evameva kho, mahārāja, cātumeyyakā ca sakyā brahmā ca sahampati tathāgatappavediteheva opammehi tathāgataṃ ārādhesuṃ tosesuṃ pasādesuṃ, tesañca tathāgato pasanno‘ sādhū’ ti abbhānumodi.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Yathā vā pana, mahārāja, kappako rañño santakeneva suvaṇṇaphaṇakena rañño uttamaṅgaṃ pasādhayamāno rājānaṃ ārādheti toseti pasādeti, tassa ca rājā pasanno‘ sādhū’ ti abbhānumodati, yathicchitamanuppadeti, evameva kho, mahārāja, cātumeyyakā ca sakyā brahmā ca sahampati tathāgatappavediteheva opammehi tathāgataṃ ārādhesuṃ tosesuṃ pasādesuṃ, tesañca tathāgato pasanno‘ sādhū’ ti abbhānumodi.
chinese: 同樣的，大王！

pali: ‘ ‘ Yathā vā pana, mahārāja, saddhivihāriko upajjhāyābhataṃ piṇḍapātaṃ gahetvā upajjhāyassa upanāmento upajjhāyaṃ ārādheti toseti pasādeti, tañca upajjhāyo pasanno‘ sādhū’ ti abbhānumodati, evameva kho, mahārāja, cātumeyyakā ca sakyā brahmā ca sahampati tathāgatappavediteheva opammehi tathāgataṃ ārādhesuṃ tosesuṃ pasādesuṃ, tesañca tathāgato pasanno‘ sādhū’ ti abbhānumoditvā sabbadukkhaparimuttiyā dhammaṃ desesī’’ ti.
chinese: 在這品中有十二個問題。

pali: ‘‘ Sādhu, bhante nāgasena, evametaṃ tathā sampaṭicchāmīti.
Buddhasabbaññubhāvapañho dasamo.
Sabbaññutañāṇavaggo catuttho.
Imasmiṃ vagge dasa pañhā.
